title: AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF ALLEN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICÂ­IPALITY OF ALLEN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND AUTHORIZING THE ADDITIONAL APPROÂ­PRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4300 / 60 OG No. 38, 5979 (September 21, 1964)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3864, June 12, 1964 ]

AN ACT INCREASING THE BED CAPACITY OF ALLEN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICÂIPALITY OF ALLEN, PROVINCE OF SAMAR, AND AUTHORIZING THE ADDITIONAL APPROÂPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

Section 1. The bed capacity of Allen Emergency Hospital in the Municipality of Allen, Province of Samar, is hereby increased from twenty-five to fifty.

Sec. 2. Additional sum necessary in accordance with the provisions of Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hunÂdred thirty-nine is hereby authorized to be appropriated to carry out the purposes of this Act for the fiscal year nineteen hundred and sixty-five, in addition to its existÂing appropriations. Thereafter, said sums shall be inÂcluded in the annual General Appropriations Act.

Sec. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 12, 1964.
